channel.title: Azure News Feed
channel.description: Aggregated daily news from Azure blogs

item.title: Migrating Splunk Logs to Azure Application Insights on VMs
item.description: Phase 0 – Understanding the Current Environment Before touching any code or agents, map out the existing architecture. Current setup: Applications write logs via log4net → local log files on VMs Splunk Universal Forwarders read logs → send to Splunk Indexers Splunk dashboards, alerts, and...
item.dc:creator: skundapura

item.title: Mange's and Steam on Windows Insider Program
item.description: It's been determined that the game executable is date (and time) checking the XML files to determine which is the newest.So, in the first pic above, we can see the Steam installation of SMR. All files will have the date of the install by Steam. The original and GOG versions have a dates from 2006...
item.dc:creator: Jeffersonkiu

item.title: Windows: Track changes by program to completely remove it when uninstalled ?
item.description: Changes in -FilesRegistryTask SchedulerI know Uninstaller like Revo Uninstaller Pro and Bulk Crap Uninstaller exits but they them selves are like a little bloatware.
item.dc:creator: Issacoin

item.title: AG-UI: The Future of Agent-Driven User Interfaces
item.description: As AI agents evolve from simple chatbots into workflow engines, decision-makers, and copilots, one challenge has remained stubbornly unsolved: How do we connect intelligent agents to rich, dynamic, user-facing interfaces without custom plumbing every single time? Introducing AG-UI (Agent–User...
item.dc:creator: VaidhyaP

item.title: PC keeps crashing when I try to play most games and I can't figure out why
item.description: All the errors seem memory related. It will also crash to a black screen but it always restarts before I can get a good look at the error message. I've reinstalled windows, I've tested both the RAM and all the Hard drives separately, I've tried "sfc /scannow" and "Windows Memory Diagnostic" but...
item.dc:creator: RogerMinn

item.title: Steam Controller can only be used in steam currently due to no Windows driver
item.description: It will work outside steam but will be limitedAlso how is it erogonomicaly? And is it easy to switch between steam controller layout and xbox layout? I have xbox elite series 2 and works perfectly had some noise problems which got solved by applying some grease/lubricant. Is it heavier to less...
item.dc:creator: Jeffersonkiu

item.title: I can't connect to my University VPN
item.description: Hi everyone! I just moved to Fedora from Windows 11, and I am having troubles connecting to my university VPN. More specifically, I tried to connect by the option in network settings, the login page opens correctly on my browser, but after it asks me to insert the OTP code required, it says that...
item.dc:creator: Bridgero

item.title: Upcoming Compute API Change: Always return non-null securityType
item.description: Overview Starting with Azure Compute API version 2025‑11‑01, responses for Azure Virtual Machines (VMs) and Virtual Machine Scale Sets (VMSS) will include a non‑null securityType value in all operations. While this is a small behavioral change, it can impact deployments if they rely on null checks...
item.dc:creator: AjKundnani

item.title: General availability of Default Ruleset (DRS) 2.2 for Web Application Firewall
item.description: Introduction As attackers continue to evolve their techniques, organizations require web application security that keeps pace with emerging threats without disrupting legitimate traffic. Azure Web Application Firewall (WAF) continues to evolve to meet these demands and now supports Default Rule Set...
item.dc:creator: andrewmathu

item.title: Securing Your AI Agents Before They Ship: Red Teaming with Microsoft PyRIT
item.description: Securing Your AI Agents Before They Ship: Red Teaming with Microsoft PyRIT You wouldn't ship a web app without running OWASP ZAP or Snyk. So why are AI agents going to production without a single security scan? Prompt injection, data leakage, system prompt theft — the OWASP Top 10 for LLM...
item.dc:creator: vsriramdas

item.title: The best free screen recorder for mac apple silicon m5?
item.description: Received a new MacBook Pro M5 as birthday gift and could not figure out the way to screen record on mac with system audio. I know macOS has built-in screen recording options, though I am confused about the difference between recording system sound and recording from the microphone.I would...
item.dc:creator: Benjaminron

item.title: How can I revert iphone to previous ios 18?
item.description: Hi all,My iPhone was upgraded to iOS 26 from iOS 18 one week ago but it causes a lot of issues since then. After updating, the phone is not working as well as before, so I would like to know whether it is possible to revert my iPhone to older iOS safely.I am not very experienced with this, so I...
item.dc:creator: Nicoleep

item.title: Making Sense of Azure AI Foundry IQ
item.description: As enterprise teams build AI agents, the hardest design decisions often have nothing to do with models. Instead, they revolve around a more fundamental question: How should an agent access organizational knowledge in a way that is accurate, secure, and sustainable over time? Azure AI Foundry IQ is...
item.dc:creator: Samarpitaa

item.title: Building an Enterprise Knowledge Copilot with Foundry IQ and Agentic Retrieval on Azure AI
item.description: Every enterprise has the same problem: knowledge scattered across SharePoint, file shares, wikis, and email. This article walks through building a knowledge copilot that unifies that data behind a single conversational interface — using Microsoft's Foundry IQ knowledge bases and the agentic...
item.dc:creator: Shah_Viral

item.title: Transforming Video Content into Structured SOPs Using Graph-based RAG
item.description: Introduction In today’s digital-first environments, a large portion of enterprise knowledge lives inside video content, training sessions, onboarding walkthroughs, and recorded operational procedures. While videos are great for learning, they are not ideal for quick reference, compliance, or...
item.dc:creator: dikshashakya

item.title: Building a Scalable IoT Platform for Facility Management with Azure Serverless Services
item.description: Business Requirements The business required a platform that could: - Handle multi-provider device telemetry ingestion - Apply configurable business rules in real-time - Send automated notifications via email and SMS - Provide operations teams with a modern portal for monitoring and control -...
item.dc:creator: nishantmv

item.title: Flexible Cooling for AI Growth: How Zonal Architecture Supports Diverse Hardware Needs
item.description: By: Ricardo Bianchini, Steve Solomon, Brijesh Warrier, Martin Herbert, Jay Jochim, Husam Alissa, Pulkit Misra, Eric Peterson and Cam Turner Context - Microsoft is pioneering zonal cooling in its next-generation AI datacenters, enabling flexible, performant, efficient, and sustainable thermal...
item.dc:creator: stsolo

item.title: Monthly news - January 2026
item.description: Microsoft DefenderMonthly news - January 2026 Edition This is our monthly "What's new" blog post, summarizing product updates and various new assets we released over the past month across our Defender products. In this edition, we are looking at all the goodness from December 2025. Defender for...
item.dc:creator: HeikeRitter

item.title: Microsoft Ignite 2025: Transforming Phishing Response with Agentic Innovation
item.description: Phishing attacks remain one of the most persistent and damaging threats to organizations worldwide. Security teams are under constant pressure to investigate a growing number of user reported phishing emails daily, ensuring accurate verdicts and timely responses. As threats grow in volume and...
item.dc:creator: JeffreyPinkston

item.title: Visual Studio April Update – Cloud Agent Integration
item.description: GitHub Copilot in Visual Studio is becoming more agentic with every release. This update brings cloud agent integration front and center, letting you start remote coding sessions without leaving the IDE. The post Visual Studio April Update – Cloud Agent Integration appeared first on Visual Studio...
item.dc:creator: Mark Downie

item.title: The problem: All-or-nothing batch processing in Azure Service Bus
item.description: Azure Functions lets you settle each Service Bus message on its own within a batch. Complete, abandon, dead-letter, or defer messages one by one to avoid duplicate processing and handle errors with precision. The post The problem: All-or-nothing batch processing in Azure Service Bus appeared first...
item.dc:creator: Swapnil Nagar

item.title: GitHub for Beginners: Getting started with Markdown
item.description: Discover how to format and edit your comments and posts using Markdown. The post GitHub for Beginners: Getting started with Markdown appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Kedasha Kerr

item.title: HashiCorp Vault Integration with Terraform — Secure Secret Management
item.description: Introduction When provisioning cloud infrastructure using Terraform, it is common to require sensitive values such as: Administrative credentials (usernames, passwords) API keys and tokens SSH keys Database connection strings Domain join credentials In most environments, these secrets are commonly:...
item.dc:creator: singhshub

item.title: SharePoint Framework (SPFx) roadmap update – April 2026
item.description: SPFx is powering the future of Microsoft 365 with AI driven portals and deep integrations across SharePoint and Microsoft 365. The April 2026 update shares new features and the roadmap for the next evolution built for the AI era. This is a transparent community driven journey that we shape...
item.dc:creator: Vesa Juvonen

item.title: Welcome to SkiaSharp 4.0 Preview 1
item.description: SkiaSharp 4.0 Preview 1 is here. Learn all about the new features and how Uno Platform has stepped up as a co-maintainer. The post Welcome to SkiaSharp 4.0 Preview 1 appeared first on .NET Blog.
item.dc:creator: David Ortinau

item.title: High-Performance Distributed Caching with .NET and Postgres on Azure
item.description: Adding caching to your application architecture can significantly improve key performance metrics, cut latency, and reduce load across downstream systems. In this walkthrough, we highlight the latest caching best practices and incorporate these design patterns into a reusable .NET application that...
item.dc:creator: Jared Meade

item.title: Microsoft Defender: New Advanced hunting enhancements
item.description: Co-author: Jeremy Tan As a security analyst who actively hunts for critical threats, one of the most frustrating things that can happen is hitting a limit mid-query or encounter an experience that doesn’t behave as expected. The resulting friction and time spent troubleshooting or navigating takes...
item.dc:creator: Noa_Nutkevitch

item.title: How Microsoft 1ES uses agentic AI to take on security and compliance at scale
item.description: Microsoft’s Customer Zero blog series gives an insider view of how Microsoft builds and operates Microsoft using our trusted, enterprise-grade IQ platform. Learn best practices from our engineering teams with real-world lessons, architectural patterns, and operational strategies for pressure-tested...
item.dc:creator: JennyF

item.title: Non profit business standard users join PCs to Active directory
item.description: Hi I have waded through masses of online stuff and can't get a clear answer to this. It is driving me insane!We have about 10 users on nonprofit business standard - all running win 10 or win 11 pro.I need to allow different users to share a PC - but have user restricted access to microsoft 365...
item.dc:creator: Coppo23

item.title: Securing the git push pipeline: Responding to a critical remote code execution vulnerability
item.description: How we validated, fixed, and investigated a critical vulnerability in under two hours, and confirmed no exploitation. The post Securing the git push pipeline: Responding to a critical remote code execution vulnerability appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Alexis Wales

item.title: Update host keys to use SFTP on Azure Blob Storage
item.description: Update host keys to use SFTP on Azure Blob Storage Some Azure Storage users may have received an alert informing that Microsoft will change the public key, like this. This article describes the impact this will have on the SFTP blob service and what are the changes needed.On this article: What is...
item.dc:creator: LuisFilipe

item.title: Simplifying AWS defense with Microsoft Sentinel UEBA
item.description: Learn how Microsoft Sentinel UEBA helps defenders distinguish benign AWS activity from attacker behavior by enriching raw CloudTrail logs with clear, binary behavioral signals derived from baseline user, peer, and device behavior patterns. The post Simplifying AWS defense with Microsoft Sentinel...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft Defender Security Research Team

item.title: Project Pavilion Presence at KubeCon EU 2026
item.description: KubeCon + CloudNativeCon Europe 2026 took place from 23 to 26 March at RAI Amsterdam, and it was a strong one. The themes running through the week reflected where the cloud native community is right now: AI moving from experimentation into production, platform engineering continuing to mature, and...
item.dc:creator: lexinadolski

item.title: Istio‑Based Weighted Traffic Management on AKS for Enterprise Workloads
item.description: Istio‑Based Weighted Traffic Management Pre-Requisites: AKS containers (internal pods, no Envoy sidecar) Istio Installed and Configured at AKS Cluster (Ingress Gateway–based traffic management) Section 1 — Overview & Why Istio Is Required In modern distributed systems, traffic control is no longer...
item.dc:creator: Amreen

item.title: Welcome to Azure Cosmos DB Conf 2026
item.description: Today is the day. Azure Cosmos DB Conf 2026, in partnership with AMD, is a free virtual developer event focused on building modern, scalable applications with Azure Cosmos DB. The agenda features Microsoft engineers, product team leaders, and members of the global developer community sharing...
item.dc:creator: Jay Gordon

item.title: New Local Management Group for ALZ & Updated Sovereign Policies for SLZ
item.description: Following on from months of working alongside customers, partners, and our internal product groups, we have now made two updates to the Azure landing zone (ALZ) and the Sovereign landing zone (SLZ), that I’d like to walk you through in this post: A new dedicated ‘Local’ Management Group added...
item.dc:creator: jtracey93msft

item.title: Troubleshooting SQL MI Failover Group Creation in Hub–Spoke Network with Centralized Firewall
item.description: Overview Failover groups for Azure SQL Managed Instance provide a managed way to replicate all user databases from a primary managed instance to a secondary managed instance in another region, with stable listener endpoints that remain constant across geo-failovers. In this post, we share a field...
item.dc:creator: YogeshwaranKannaiyan

item.title: PowerToys 0.99 is here: new monitor controls, easier window management, and Dock upgrades
item.description: We’re back with a fresh PowerToys release! This month introduces Power Display for controlling your monitors from the system tray, Grab And Move for quickly moving and resizing windows, and a wave of improvements to Command Palette and the Dock, along with updates across the utility suite. You can...
item.dc:creator: Niels Laute

item.title: An update on GitHub availability
item.description: Here’s what we’ve done—and what we’re still doing—to improve our availability and reliability. The post An update on GitHub availability appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Vlad Fedorov

item.title: Windows 11's Absurd Sleep Timer Recommendations
item.description: My Windows 11 power settings recommend a hibernate timer of over 596,000 hours equivalent to ~70 years. My battery can’t possibly last that long.
item.dc:creator: JacobBrown

item.title: Windows11 File Explorer Customization?
item.description: I relied on customizable shortcuts (Alt+keys) in Windows 10 File Explorer. Is this feature available in Windows 11?
item.dc:creator: Mikaeliop

item.title: Windows 11 stuck in insert external storage loop
item.description: Windows 11 is stuck in a loop with Please insert external storage media and press OK on boot, can't operate normally. Need solutions.
item.dc:creator: OakleyCruz

item.title: Volume decreases after enabling Enhanced Audio in Windows 11
item.description: After enabling the “Enhanced Audio” feature in System Settings, the playback volume noticeably decreases; when this feature is disabled, the volume returns to normal. Even without enabling any specific audio effects, simply toggling this feature on and off results in a noticeable difference in...
item.dc:creator: AAbner

item.title: ryujinx refusing to launch?
item.description: happens with multiple versions and it's whitelisted in the antivirus
item.dc:creator: Archero9

item.title: OBS interface randomly turns pitch black, except preview and program windows
item.description: Os - Windows 11,GPU - GTX 1650 Ti (laptop).Issue persists, I've updated Nvidia GPU drivers, updated OBS itself, but this thing keeps on for several months.When this is happening, I kinda locked in that, the only thing that helps me, is "Fold all windows" (I do it with three fingers swipe down on...
item.dc:creator: Frederickk

item.title: "netbird_installer_0.70.0_windows_amd64.msi" got flagged as a threat by Windows built-in antivirus
item.description: Anyone else getting this?
item.dc:creator: Harrisonte

item.title: How to Report Single-User Teams Online Meetings
item.description: In 2024, I wrote a script explaining how to report details of Teams online meetings, including participants. Now someone wants to report single-user meetings. Their reason is that company management believe that some remote workers schedule online meetings that only they attend with the intention...
item.dc:creator: TonyRedmond

item.title: Simplify Real-Time Pipelines with the Fabric Eventstreams SQL Operator (Generally Available)
item.description: The SQL operator was first introduced in preview to give customers an early look at a code‑first transformation experience in Fabric Eventstreams. During preview, customers used the SQL operator to simplify real-time pipelines, consolidate transformation logic, and unlock advanced scenarios using...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Any fast and stable way to transfer pictures from iphone to computer?
item.description: I have over 100GB of pictures on my iPhone, and I need a reliable way to transfer them to my Windows PC without crashing halfway or missing files. I don't want cloud uploads (too slow for this much data), and I've had bad luck with random free tools freezing or disconnecting. What's the most stable...
item.dc:creator: Margareot

item.title: MacOS platform SSO deployment issues
item.description: Hello, We tried to deploy MacOS platform SSO but the devices are having problems with their authentication. The devices are connected through company portal but keep asking for logins and authentication, especially on reboot. Some users are prompted to sign-in to their entra account several times...
item.dc:creator: ITIMax
